name: Dak's Honeyed Beet Oat Bran Bread (Bread Machine)
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Better for Bread white flour
1 Small can (8 1/4 oz) Julienne beets, drain, save
recipeInstructions:
1. Set Breadmaker's browning control to light.
2. Put all the ingredients into the pan in the order listed: Yeast, white flour, whole wheat flour, oat bran, rolled oats, gluten, salt, honey, cinnamon, cloves, golden raisins, egg whites or 1 egg or egg substitute, and beets (reserve liquid).
3. Add the reserved beet juice and warm water to the dry ingredients until they equal 1/2 cup plus 3 tbsp.
4. Select "Oat/French" setting on your bread machine and push the start button.
